name: Go - Plaz Check Cashing
description_short: Go Plaz Check Cashing offers check cashing and financial services at their Los Angeles location on S San Pedro St, with extended weekday hours until 7 PM.
description_long: Go Plaz Check Cashing is a check-cashing service located in Los Angeles, California at 2121 S San Pedro St in the downtown/South LA area. The business operates as a financial services provider serving the local community with check-cashing and related transaction services. Based on available information, the company maintains a physical storefront location that has been listed in local business directories. The service appears to target individuals and small businesses in the Los Angeles area who need check-cashing services and related financial transaction support. Go Plaz Check Cashing maintains consistent operating hours, open Sundays 8 AM to 4 PM and Mondays through Saturdays 8 AM to 7 PM, providing extended availability for working customers. The company can be reached at (213) 748-7983 for inquiries about their services. While specific service details beyond the check-cashing category are not detailed in available public information, the business operates in a competitive market of check-cashing and money services providers. The location in the S San Pedro corridor places it in an accessible area of Los Angeles. Without comprehensive service documentation, customers should contact the business directly to confirm all available services, fees, and specific offerings.
address: 2121 San Pedro St A, Los Angeles, CA 90011

company_info.headquarters: 2121 San Pedro St A, Los Angeles, CA 90011

pros: Extended weekday hours until 7 PM (Monday-Saturday), accommodating working customers
Early Sunday opening at 8 AM for weekend check cashing needs
Established local business with a physical storefront location
Accessible South Los Angeles location on S San Pedro St
Direct phone line available for customer inquiries at (213) 748-7983
cons: Limited public information available about specific services offered beyond check cashing
No website with service details, fee schedule, or online resources
Sunday hours close relatively early at 4 PM, limiting weekend access
No information about competitive fee rates compared to other check-cashing services
Reliance on phone contact or in-person visits for service inquiries
best_for: Los Angeles residents needing same-day check cashing services
Small business owners requiring check depositing and cashing
Unbanked or underbanked individuals in the South LA area
diagnosis: Go Plaz Check Cashing is best for Los Angeles residents who need accessible, in-person check-cashing services with extended weekday hours. The main caveat is that minimal service details and fee information are publicly available, requiring direct contact with the business to understand their full offerings and pricing structure.
